metadata.name: workflow_example
metadata.description: Developer reference template demonstrating Dryade workflow patterns: conditional branching, parallel execution, and error handling

data.task: Classify the incoming task by type and priority. Determine if it requires research, document processing, or both. Output a structured classification with routing recommendation
Execute the classified task. If research type: search and gather information. If document type: process and transform content. Log each step for the execution trace
Validate the task output for completeness and quality. Check that all requested elements are present. If validation fails, note what needs to be re-done
Format the validated output into a polished result with execution trace summary showing each workflow step, timing, and agent used
